creator: bart.tapolsky@i.ua
text:
Apache says:
	gt# /usr/local/etc/rc.d/apache22 restart
	Performing sanity check on apache22 configuration:
	httpd: Syntax error on line 103 of /usr/local/etc/apache22/httpd.conf: Cannot load /usr/local/libexec/apache22/mod_ntlm.so into server: /usr/local/libexec/apache22/mod_ntlm.so: Undefined symbol "apr_pool_sub_make"

Fix: 

Maybe this can help.
	http://www.lissyara.su/?id=1510
How-To-Repeat: 	
	Install apache and mod_ntlm2 and start apache server
